What's up guys? Okay so this is the promotional calendar. Okay so these are the things that you're running into inside of your facility. Now there's there's three layers to this. Okay you have your internal, your external, and then your events. Okay events are mostly to bring referrals and generate just like engagement in community and cut retention. Okay or sorry increase retention, cut attrition. Alright the internal plays all the cash plays right. Now you can't be promoting them all the time right because then people will get like just immune to it. So you do it on pushes. I like 14-day cycles for internal plays. I think it's more than enough time because everyone's pretty much cycled through and heard you say it four or five times. Alright within that 14 days so they're gonna sign up, they're gonna sign up. Right so you don't need to do it in this order. Okay I just want to be clear here. Really for any of these plays you don't need to do it in this order. But this is a sample order that way the extra like where your cold market is seeing is they're seeing differing promotions. I like 21-day cycles for sales promotions mostly because I feel like just in my experience in most in most markets 21 days is it's long enough that you can get a big number in but it's short enough that it doesn't like a month can seem long. 21 days is like oh shoot we only have three weeks I could start right and so that you can start hustling and your team understands that. Now notice six week 28 days, six week, 12 week, HCP and so you can alternate these things. That being said like you don't need to alternate your offers like if you have four external offers that are high converting which these ones are like you're pretty much good. What you really need to do is not necessarily change the offers but change the look in the feel of the ads. Okay the offer more or less is gonna always be the same because you're like we're facilities they're gonna be getting a certain amount of time to work out at the make a decision like that's kind of the concept. Alright now we put a couple spins on it with challenge on the end instead of a trial but it's more or less the same thing. Alright I obviously help you with that too but like just from an overarching standpoint like changing the look in the field is what's going to allow you to continually hit your marketplace without you know hitting a dead stock because they're still always gonna be wanting marketplace and need to lose weight so they just need to give them offer that they actually that catches their attention and they don't get better blindness meaning they haven't felt like they've seen you're out before. in the sessions just being like Susie I know you got some friends and then afterwards when you're one-on-one like whether getting their water bottle like like you should have your trainers approach like no there's there's really no reason it's like so can I count on you like because you need like and the trainers need to understand that they need to feed the business because the business feeds everyone right so it's important to continue feeding it and that's also ultimately how we help more people okay now these many events these guys okay these are just this is not an exhaustive list of the things that you can do the key points on the many events is that I just we always pay for babysitters that like people love to have things to do and they don't have anything else to do all right so hey bring all your kids to the gym have two babysitters there they can have them run around in circles so they're exhausted and then the adults go and do any of these things okay and they have to pay for themselves at that point but this babysitter thing gives them a date night virtually once or twice a month that the gym's basically sponsoring so that's value right but always have this as a running clear theme okay we pay for you and your friend if you bring a friend okay so if you have a movie night you'll pay for them and their friend now what happens here like think about this it's reciprocity if I pay for a movie ticket it's $20 right for her and her friend or two friends right they're gonna feel really really guilty that I just paid for them they will okay I promise and then what's gonna happen when I talk to her friend and say hey what do you so what are your fitness goals right like it's a loaded event right it's like there's clearly a purpose and an agenda and so if they bring their friend it gives them in a way to introduce them to the business it's not intimidating yeah come out of the movies they're really cool you meet the trainers they're awesome and then they get to meet the trainers they get to meet you you you know you realize that you're not some bearded jackspur skin they're like you're actually really nice and then you say hey why don't you come in on Monday like we'll set you a time what's coming and then you set appointments from there but these are warm referral appointments you can sell these people everything there's no discounts they're not risk like basically if a referral shows up for an appointment you should close them so these are just sales so if I'm paying $20 for a sale I'm gonna make way more than $20 to have someone sit down with me okay so this is how you do the mini events I do them on 21 days calendars because that way doesn't seem like oh it's always the first Monday of the month because then it becomes a normal thing and the people stop going all right so when it's a 21 day event they some months there's one some months there's twice you don't tell them that it's every 21 days and that also gives you the liberty if you get super busy when we can push it back all right but um and that way you're not held to it's really where's the event like it doesn't become an expectation it's always a surprise and it's always a fun thing that you do okay so all of these are cool fun ways to do it I'm not gonna name them all you can do it use your own imagination but typically low budget things drop the kids off and then they come with you and the adults have fun okay so this is the promotional calendar this is the life flow of how the business people come in this way technically referrals would also be over their EFTs you're continually selling them on how great you are and then they get sold warm traffic ascension plans to push them up the value ladder and you're constantly confronting them and asking
